info.english_meaning: to hate to dislike to grudge

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'ASramasTAn viDarmasTAH prAdvizanta parasparam' (BA॰SAM॰228.65) praSabdena nArTaH yo dvezaH sa eva pradvezaH yaTA yo dIpaH sa eva pradIpaH
'pradvezo bahumAno vA saMsargAdeva jAyate' (svapna॰1.7) ityatrApi taTA
